enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Sonapareeya'?

'Sonapareeya' conveys a joyful expression of love and affection, celebrating the beauty of relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Mariyaan'?

In Mariyaan, the song plays during a romantic sequence, highlighting the protagonist's deep feelings for his beloved.

Who are the singers of 'Sonapareeya'?

The song features the talented voices of Haricharan, Javed Ali, and Nakash Aziz.

Who composed the music for 'Sonapareeya'?

The music for 'Sonapareeya' was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was 'Sonapareeya' released?

'Sonapareeya' was released on May 15, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Sonapareeya', the characters express their love through a lively and melodious tune that resonates with joy and affection. The song captures the essence of romance, showcasing the beauty of relationships against the backdrop of the film's narrative. With its upbeat rhythm and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and celebration. This enchanting piece is a perfect fit for weddings and romantic occasions, making it a timeless favorite.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sonapareeya from the Mariyaan soundtrack is a vibrant celebration of love, beautifully rendered by the harmonious voices of Haricharan, Javed Ali, and Nakash Aziz. With AR Rahman's enchanting composition and Vaali's heartfelt lyrics, this song captures the essence of romance and joy. Dive into the melodious world of Sonapareeya and experience the magic of love like never before!
stanzaMeanings: My heart rises, oh golden one, the sea is my love. Yesterday, she is still a little bit, I love my Africa, where did she go?
Oh yes, no matter the day, you are the one who created me, oh yes, in our work, you laugh like this, you are the golden one.
Golden one... golden one, are you the one?
Oh yes, no matter the day, you are the one who created me, oh yes, in our work, you laugh like this, you are the golden one.
I saw a crab with ten legs, golden one, it rolled and went away, standing on one leg.
The pearl has a name, golden one, he is a big guy, went to the quarter and got lost.
Oh beautiful one, golden one, the lovely one, golden one, all beauty is in you, golden one.
Golden one... golden one... golden one... are you the one?
Oh yes, oh yes... golden one... oh yes... oh yes... oh yes...
In the eyes, there is a treasure... oh yes, in the heart, there is a sale... oh yes, standing in the hands... oh yes, walking in the way... oh yes, oh yes... oh yes...
In the art, we placed the treasure ship, we took the pearls, we took them all, ha... the mind is filled with joy, the heart is filled with joy, we took them all.
How long will it last, golden one? In the sea, the tree will grow, now it has just started to rise, yes...
Like a son or a nephew, golden one, no one like him has seen the sea's world, no one has seen it, right?
In the heart, you are staying, golden one, like a fish, you are shining, golden one, like a flower, you are blooming, golden one.
Golden one... golden one... golden one... are you the one?
Oh yes, no matter the day, you are the one who created me, oh yes, in our work, you laugh like this, you are the golden one.
